creator: dmitryluhtionov@gmail.com
text:
I rebooting notebook and see

root@acer:/home/mitya # ifconfig wlan0 scan
SSID/MESH ID                      BSSID              CHAN RATE    S:N     INT CAPS
Altair free_5G                    34:60:f9:c7:45:b9   44   54M  -81:-96   100 E    WPS BSSLOAD HTCAP VHTCAP VHTOPMODE WME
root@acer:/home/mitya # ifconfig wlan0 list scan
SSID/MESH ID                      BSSID              CHAN RATE    S:N     INT CAPS
Altair free_5G                    34:60:f9:c7:45:b9   44   54M  -81:-96   100 E    WPS BSSLOAD HTCAP VHTCAP VHTOPMODE WME


root@acer:/home/mitya # ifconfig wlan0 
wlan0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
	options=0
	ether 68:94:23:7a:41:25
	inet 192.168.0.112 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.168.0.255
	groups: wlan
	ssid "Altair free_5G" channel 44 (5220 MHz 11a ht/40+) bssid 34:60:f9:c7:45:b9
	regdomain 108 indoor ecm authmode OPEN privacy OFF txpower 30 bmiss 7
	mcastrate 6 mgmtrate 6 scanvalid 60 ampdulimit 64k ampdudensity 4
	shortgi -uapsd wme burst roaming MANUAL
	parent interface: ath0
	media: IEEE 802.11 Wireless Ethernet MCS mode 11na
	status: associated
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>


I rebooting notebook again and see

oot@acer:/home/mitya # ifconfig wlan0 scan
SSID/MESH ID                      BSSID              CHAN RATE    S:N     INT CAPS
W0028082563320                    ca:c9:a3:a5:34:c6    1   54M  -89:-96   100 EP   RSN WPA
STO                               38:6b:1c:ca:be:b2    1   54M  -79:-96   100 EP   HTCAP WPA RSN BSSLOAD WME
blackout                          b8:27:eb:92:b6:b2    6   54M  -78:-96   100 EP   RSN HTCAP WME
lena                              10:fe:ed:b4:85:64    6   54M  -79:-96   100 EPS  RSN HTCAP APCHANREP WPA WME ATH WPS
WV-CONNECT                        f8:5e:3c:0f:71:c4   11   54M  -91:-96   100 EPS  RSN HTCAP WME
Altair_5G                         1c:61:b4:5d:1f:f8   36   54M  -90:-96   100 EP   RSN WPS BSSLOAD HTCAP VHTCAP VHTOPMODE WME
TP-Link_8813_5G                   30:de:4b:a4:88:15   40   54M  -91:-96   100 EP   RSN WPS BSSLOAD HTCAP VHTCAP VHTOPMODE WME
Altair free_5G                    34:60:f9:c7:45:b9   44   54M  -82:-96   100 E    WPS BSSLOAD HTCAP VHTCAP VHTOPMODE WME
netis_F29776                      e4:be:ed:f2:97:76    3   54M  -87:-96    25 EP   HTCAP WPA RSN WME
Altair free                       34:60:f9:c7:45:b7    3   54M  -83:-96   100 E    HTCAP BSSLOAD WME WPS
Noob                              48:a9:8a:74:89:c0    9   54M  -72:-96   100 EPS  HTCAP RSN WME WPS
Kyivstar_78EE                     68:ff:7b:10:78:ee   10   54M  -82:-96   100 EP   RSN WPS HTCAP WME BSSLOAD
